property.name: ranger.rms.hms.enabled
property.description: Enable RMS HMS notification processing

property.name: ranger.rms.hms.polling.interval.ms
property.description: Interval for polling HMS notifications

property.name: ranger.rms.hive.service.name
property.description: Name of the Hive service in Ranger

property.name: ranger.rms.hdfs.service.name
property.description: Name of the HDFS service in Ranger

property.name: ranger.rms.ozone.service.name
property.description: Name of the Ozone service in Ranger

property.name: ranger.rms.s3.service.name
property.description: Name of the S3 service in Ranger

property.name: ranger.rms.supported.uri.schemes
property.description: Comma-separated list of supported URI schemes

property.name: ranger.rms.map.managed.tables
property.description: Whether to track managed Hive tables

property.name: ranger.plugin.hdfs.chained.services
property.description: Comma-separated list of chained services for HDFS

property.name: ranger.plugin.hdfs.chained.services.cm_hive.impl
property.description: Implementation class for HDFS-Hive chained plugin

property.name: ranger.plugin.hdfs.mapping.hive.authorize.with.only.chained.policies
property.description: If true, deny access when no applicable Hive policy exists

property.name: ranger.plugin.hdfs.accesstype.mapping.read
property.description: Hive access types for HDFS read

property.name: ranger.plugin.hdfs.accesstype.mapping.write
property.description: Hive access types for HDFS write

property.name: ranger.plugin.hdfs.accesstype.mapping.execute
property.description: Hive access types for HDFS execute

property.name: ranger.plugin.hdfs.mapping.source.download.interval
property.description: Interval for downloading mappings from RMS (ms)

property.name: ranger.plugin.ozone.chained.services
property.description: Comma-separated list of chained services for Ozone

property.name: ranger.plugin.ozone.chained.services.cm_hive.impl
property.description: Implementation class for Ozone-Hive chained plugin

property.name: ranger.raz.service-type.s3.chained.services
property.description: Comma-separated list of chained services for S3

property.name: ranger.raz.service-type.s3.chained.services.cm_hive.impl
property.description: Implementation class for S3-Hive chained plugin

property.name: ranger.raz.service-type.s3.privileged.user.names
property.description: Users with full access (skip Hive policy check)
